notes: TOWER's six-face arcana die. BREAK CLEAN is the highest success — the structure lets go in the right place. HOLD SIGNAL is the failure — the carrier won't drop.

faces.description: Success ★★. The structure lets go where you wanted it to. Advance two toward the trunk sever.
Success ★. The bumper lands. The room exhales. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The queue catches up. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 CARRIER).
Partial. The rack-B amber light comes on. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 CARRIER).
Failure. The carrier didn't drop. +1 CARRIER. The cable hum rises a half-tone.
Wild. ★ if you have PATCHED AROUND this turn — the bypass is live. Otherwise: failure, and the obstruction lights speed up by a tenth of a second.
